title: Hayden Case’s CV
text:
Software Engineer, AI Tester, Mod Developer

case.hayden04@gmail.com | Download PDF



Developing websites and creating various applications for public use



Bachelor of Computer Engineering in Software Development | January 2026 - April 2028
Brigham Young University - Idaho Rexburg, Idaho
Associate of Applied Science in Software Development | September 2020 - December 2022
Metropolitan Community College Lee’s Summit, Missouri



AI Tester | Handshake AI Remote October 2025 - Present

Performed tasks focused on improving AI behavior to better emulate human interaction and responses.
Designed and refined prompts to enable AI systems to generate realistic and natural image outputs.
Developed an understanding of practical and ethical applications of AI in modern society.

Missionary | The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints Nagoya, Japan April 2023 - September 2025

Adapted to new cultural and linguistic environments while maintaining strict discipline.
Learned Japanese and managed scheduling, records, and progress tracking using digital tools.
Delivered lessons and presentations, improving communication, and cross-cultural collaboration.

Software Development Intern | DataLocker Overland Park, Kansas May 2021 - March 2023

Developed automation scripts in Python to validate factory and password reset functions for hardware devices saving $1,000,000 a year in outsourcing costs.
Updated company webapp allowing more user customization through the use of JavaScript manipulation.
Collaborated with 8 engineers across the world to troubleshoot and refine device reset procedures.




Before We Leave Item Randomizer - Using the Archipelago public library, I designed a mod for the game Before We Leave that randomized all research and item unlocks to bring a unique experience every time you play.
Southeastern Idaho Hike Trail Website - Taking from the Idaho Hike Trail API, I created a website that shows a selection of those trails and displays information about each trail and links to the trail’s main website.
Gym Idea Generator Webapp - With the help of a team, we designed an app that helps people who don’t know what to do at a gym with ideas for workouts of different types and lengths. There is also a companion forum page to find people with similar skillsets.
